text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Here we are again. The Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. I've grown up a lot since last year, haven't
I, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I think you're pretty much all grown up now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Really? Like, for real? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But there are parts of me that haven't changed
much.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Like the fact that I wanna twinkle in the Twinkle
Series!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So you have to keep your eyes on me until the
very end. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna shine brighter than anyone else! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello Brian! ☆

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...If it isn't Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey! ☆ You remember my name?! Whoa! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Your name is just stuck in my head after
racing against you so many times. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I see. Well then, just so you know, I'm your
real opponent today.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make you so excited you forget all your
pent-up stress and gloominess!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You'll be totally entranced!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Read you like a book! I'm good at that,
y'know!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Still, there's something I don't understand yet.
You've always twinkled so brightly.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm gonna beat you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Because I wanna twinkle even brighter than you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And when I do, I'll definitely send your heart
aflutter.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Fine, come at me. I'll grind you to dust.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ☆ Right back at ya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna lose!
